_comment: AGENT-11 default Claude Code settings. Hooks below are advisory by default — they run linters/typecheckers and output results, but do not block edits. To promote a hook to blocking, change `|| true` at the end of its command to `|| exit 2`. To disable a hook entirely, remove its entry from the array.

hooks.command: command -v npx >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -f package.json ] && [ -f tsconfig.json ] && npx --no-install tsc --noEmit 2>&1 || true
command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -f pyproject.toml ] && ruff check 2>&1 || true

hooks.if: Bash(rm -rf *)|Bash(git push --force*)|Bash(git push -f *)|Bash(git reset --hard*)|Bash(git clean -f*)|Bash(git branch -D*)
hooks.prompt: This command is destructive and hard to reverse. Confirm to proceed: $ARGUMENTS
